title: Marie Curie wins the Nobel Prize in Chemistry
fact: Maria Salomea Skłodowska Curie, better known as Marie Curie, was a Polish and naturalised-French physicist and chemist.

title: Ernest Rutherford wins the Nobel Prize in Chemistry
fact: Ernest Rutherford, 1st Baron Rutherford of Nelson, was a New Zealand physicist and chemist who was a pioneering researcher in both atomic and nuclear physics.
